name: vigilance-management-system
description: Vigilance Management System — monorepo for mobile (Expo), web (Vite), and Supabase backend.
//: This repo is NOT an npm workspace because Expo + workspaces is still rough on Windows + Metro. Instead the root package.json acts as a thin orchestrator: a single `npm install` from the repo root installs both sub-projects via the postinstall hook.

scripts.//install: Install both sub-projects. Used by CI and by humans running `npm install` at the repo root. Mobile uses --legacy-peer-deps because Expo SDK 53 has unavoidable peer conflicts on react/react-native (https://docs.expo.dev/get-started/installation/#install-the-expo-cli).
scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix web install --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix mobile install --no-audit --no-fund --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.//dev: Dev servers — each in its own terminal.
scripts.//lint: TypeScript-only lint for now (no ESLint config in repo). CI calls these.
scripts.lint: npm run lint:web && npm run lint:mobile
scripts.//supabase: Supabase helpers — require the supabase CLI to be installed locally.
